---
title: "Kazakstan"
subtitle: "Quarterly country report"
author: "CCC cc"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY[Q]Q"
---

## Last news
* [Экономическое развитие как путь к миру: Токаев](https://www.zakon.kz/sobytiia/6508520-ekonomicheskoe-razvitie-kak-put-k-miru--tokaev-napisal-statyu-dlya-amerikanskogo-zhurnala.html) (Источник *National Interest*)

## Risk map
```{python}
#| output: asis
import sys
from IPython.display import display, HTML

# Настройки рисков (1 - безопасно/зеленый, 10 - критично/красный)
sectors = {
    "Занятость": 3,
    "Внешний сектор": 8,
    "Бюджет": 5,
    "Денежно-кредитная": 2,
    "Реальный сектор": 6,
    "Инфляция": 9
}

def get_risk_color(level):
    """
    Вычисляет цвет от зеленого (144, 238, 144) до красного (255, 99, 71)
    """
    # Простая линейная интерполяция между зеленым и красным
    r = int(144 + (255 - 144) * (level - 1) / 9)
    g = int(238 - (238 - 99) * (level - 1) / 9)
    b = int(144 - (144 - 71) * (level - 1) / 9)
    return f"rgb({r}, {g}, {b})"

#sys.stdout.write('<div class="risk-grid">\n')
#display(HTML('<div class="risk-grid">\n'))

html_output = '<div class="risk-grid">\n'

for name, level in sectors.items():
    color = get_risk_color(level)
    html_output += f"""
    <div class="risk-card" style="background-color: {color};">
        <div class="risk-title">{name}</div>
        <div class="risk-value">Риск: {level}/10</div>
    </div>
    """
    #sys.stdout.write(block)

html_output += '</div>\n'
#sys.stdout.write('</div>\n')
#display(HTML('</div>\n'))
display(HTML(html_output))
```

## FX
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{python}
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-dpi: 300
#| fig-cap: Source
from db_utils import sovdb_read
from datetime import datetime
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.rcParams['axes.titlelocation'] = 'left'
plt.rcParams['axes.titlesize'] = 20
plt.rcParams['axes.titleweight'] = 'bold'
plt.rcParams['axes.titlepad'] = 20

plt.rcParams['axes.spines.top'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.left'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.bottom'] = False
plt.rcParams['axes.spines.right'] = False

plt.rcParams['figure.autolayout'] = True


Start = datetime(2016,1,1)
df = sovdb_read("FX_KZTUSD_NBK",Start)

if not df.empty:    
    plt.figure()
    plt.plot(df)
    plt.title('KZT strengthened')    
    plt.show()
    plt.close()
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text Some analytical text 
:::

::::
